creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Before anyone commit this patch. Make sure to add ':22' in the libltdl, ie:

-USE_AUTOTOOLS=  libltdl
-USE_AUTOTOOLS=  libtool:22
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=  libtool:22 libltdl:22

Cheers,
Mezz
